case_title: KAREN BUCHEA CRAVOTTO VS. SPRIM ADVANCED LIFE SCIENCES INC., A DELAWARE CORP

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRAVOTTO, KAREN BUCHEA AS TO DEFENDANT SPRIM ADVANCED LIFE SCIENCES INC., A DELAWARE CORP ORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
